title: Tranquil Toasty French Morbier Grill
description: A lazy Sunday polish dish featuring morbier cheese, grilled to perfection on an iron teppan, with a pungent and glassy jelly texture, dairy-free friendly options available. Perfect for a relaxing weekend brunch.
instructions: Preheat the iron teppan grill to medium high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the quince jelly and chopped fresh thyme.
Brush the preheated teppan grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Place the sliced morbier cheese on the grill and cook for about 2 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Spread a layer of the quince jelly mixture on top of the grilled cheese.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the grilled morbier cheese on toasted baguette slices.
Garnish with additional fresh thyme if desired.
Let it rest for a minute before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
